name: CopilotCodeReview
description: Perform automated code reviews on pull requests using the GitHub Copilot CLI or Claude Code
author: LittleFortSoftware

inputs.name: useClaudeCode
inputs.label: Use Claude Code CLI
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, uses Claude Code CLI (Anthropic) instead of GitHub Copilot CLI for the code review. Requires an Anthropic API key.

inputs.name: githubPat
inputs.label: GitHub PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Personal Access Token for GitHub with Copilot access. Required when using the GitHub Copilot CLI (default). Not needed when 'Use Claude Code CLI' is enabled.

inputs.name: anthropicApiKey
inputs.label: Anthropic API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: API key for Anthropic's Claude Code CLI. Required when 'Use Claude Code CLI' is enabled.

inputs.name: maxTurns
inputs.label: Max Turns (Claude Code)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Maximum number of agentic turns for Claude Code CLI. Limits how many tool-use iterations the agent can perform.

inputs.name: maxBudget
inputs.label: Max Budget USD (Claude Code)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Maximum cost in USD for the Claude Code CLI session. The session will stop if this budget is reached.

inputs.name: azureDevOpsPat
inputs.label: Azure DevOps PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Personal Access Token for Azure DevOps. Used for retrieving pull request details and posting review comments. **Required for Azure DevOps Server (on-prem)**. For Azure DevOps Services (cloud), you can use the System Access Token instead by enabling the option below.

inputs.name: useSystemAccessToken
inputs.label: Use System Access Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, uses the pipeline's System.AccessToken (OAuth) instead of a PAT. This is the Microsoft-recommended authentication method for Azure DevOps Services. **Note**: The Build Service identity must have 'Contribute to pull requests' permission on the repository. Not supported for Azure DevOps Server (on-prem).

inputs.name: organization
inputs.label: Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: The Azure DevOps organization name for cloud-hosted instances (e.g., 'myorg' from https://dev.azure.com/myorg). For Azure DevOps Server (on-prem), use 'collectionUri' instead. If neither is specified, auto-detected from the pipeline context.

inputs.name: collectionUri
inputs.label: Collection URI
inputs.helpMarkDown: The full Azure DevOps collection URI (e.g., 'https://dev.azure.com/myorg', 'https://tfs.contoso.com/tfs/DefaultCollection'). If not specified, will be automatically detected from System.CollectionUri. Use this for Azure DevOps Server (on-prem) installations.

inputs.name: project
inputs.label: Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: The Azure DevOps project name. Defaults to $(System.TeamProject).

inputs.name: repository
inputs.label: Repository
inputs.helpMarkDown: The repository name where the pull request exists. Defaults to $(Build.Repository.Name).

inputs.name: pullRequestId
inputs.label: Pull Request ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: The ID of the pull request to review. If not specified, defaults to $(System.PullRequest.PullRequestId) when run as part of a PR validation build.

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.label: Timeout (minutes)
inputs.helpMarkDown: The maximum number of minutes to allow the Copilot review to run before timing out. Default is 15 minutes.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Copilot Model
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. The Copilot model to use for the review (e.g., 'gpt-4', 'claude-sonnet'). If not specified, uses the default model.

inputs.name: promptFile
inputs.label: Custom Prompt File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Path to a .txt file containing a custom prompt for Copilot. The file must exist and contain content.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.label: Custom Prompt
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. A custom prompt to pass directly to Copilot. If both prompt and promptFile are specified, prompt takes precedence.

inputs.name: promptRaw
inputs.label: Raw Prompt
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. A raw prompt to pass directly to the Copilot CLI with no modification. Cannot be combined with other prompt inputs (prompt, promptFile, promptFileRaw).

inputs.name: promptFileRaw
inputs.label: Raw Prompt File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. Path to a file containing a raw prompt to pass directly to the Copilot CLI with no modification. Cannot be combined with other prompt inputs (prompt, promptFile, promptRaw).

inputs.name: authors
inputs.label: Author Filter
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional. A comma-separated list of email addresses. If specified, the task will only run code reviews for PRs authored by users with matching email addresses. Uses $(Build.RequestedForEmail) for comparison.

inputs.name: includeWorkItems
inputs.label: Include Work Item Details
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, fetches full details (title, description, acceptance criteria, repro steps) for work items linked to the pull request and includes them as context for the Copilot review. Disable to reduce API calls and context window usage.
